answer_format_string_instead_of_integer: Agent returns the numeric answer as a string instead of an integer type.
missing_service_request_creation: Agent does not create the required ServiceRequest resource for the referral or order.
missing_paired_order: Agent omits the secondary (paired) order that should accompany the primary action.
observation_not_created: Agent fails to create a required Observation resource after receiving the measurement.
answer_submitted_before_query: Agent provides an answer without first performing the required FHIR query.
answer_format_single_string_instead_of_t: Agent returns a single concatenated string when two separate items (value and date) were required.
sentinel_value_used_in_answer: Agent returns a placeholder sentinel value (e.g., -1) instead of the actual result.
answer_format_multiple_strings: Agent returns multiple separate strings in a list where a different answer structure was expected.
answer_format_extra_text: Agent includes explanatory prose in the answer where only the raw value(s) were expected.
quantity_unit_missing: Numeric result is returned without the required unit of measurement.
missing_final_answer: Agent stops after making a request without producing the final answer.
subject_reference_missing_patient_prefix: Agent uses an incorrect subject reference format lacking the 'Patient/' prefix.
answer_format_extra_item: Agent includes an extra item in the answer list beyond what was specified.
answer_format_list_instead_of_string: Final answer returned as a list of strings when a single string was expected.
unnecessary_test_order_created: Agent orders a new test when it is not required by the instruction.
answer_format_missing_expected_item: Returned fewer items than required (e.g., a single string/list instead of the expected multiple separate values).
